name: GT-jb-cone-closed-335
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2506 (3.3.5 Lemma), VERBATIM: "Let A be a JB algebra. Then  \$\tilde{A}_+\$  is a closed subset of  \$\tilde{A}\$ ." NOTE: the statement is about the unitization tilde-A; for A=V=B(H)_sa already unital, V embeds in tilde-V and V_+ = V cap (tilde-V)_+ is therefore norm-closed in V. (Used only as supporting ground truth; the Archimedean property of V is also delivered directly by GT-jb-orderunit-3310 + GT-orderunit-def, since an order-unit space is by definition Archimedean.)
